text:
Once upon a time in a quiet town lived a curious cat named Mittens. Mittens loved to explore the outdoors and always had a backpack tied to her collar. Every day she’d set out early in the morning, searching for new adventures.

One morning, while the sun was still peeping over the forest line, Mittens discovered an ancient oak tree with drooping branches. Within the tree hollow, she found something unusual—a crystal clear glass sphere. It was ancient, etched with lines that spoke of distant stars.

Curiosity purred loudly inside her fur. Mittens decided to carry the sphere home. When she returned, she realized it could see.

Each day she would hide behind a bush and watch. She saw birds soaring, wolves howling on the winds, and tiny creatures scuttling in the leaves. Seeing was somehow even more amazing than she’d imagined; there were colors she’d never known.
